title: UNIVERSITY OF BUSINESS AND SCIENCE
author: Parpiyeva Nazira
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article provides a detailed analysis of content, artistic features and philosophical ideas of the novel  “Never let me go’’. The novel explores the value of human life, love, friendship, fate and ethical responsibility of society through the concept of cloning. The author uses a calm and simple narrative style of encourage deep reflection and reveal the essence of humanity.
steps_raw: This article provides a detailed analysis of content, artistic features and philosophical ideas of the novel  “Never let me go’’. keywords: Literary work, cloning, humanity, love, friendship, fate, donation, ethical issues, society, freedom, memory.
